meeting_room.hub_subtitle: Recording, Logitech GROUP setup, and Bislama-aware minutes workflow
meeting_room.hub_intro: Official boardroom sittings use room conference audio (push-to-talk delegate mics or Logitech GROUP) as a single feed into Zoom/Teams. Upload the recording, then repair ASR text before chair approval.
meeting_room.hub_delegate_title: High-stakes sittings: one speaker at a time
meeting_room.hub_delegate_body: When several commissioners talk over a single table mic, the recording becomes an unreadable blur — no ASR or Claude can separate it. Push-to-talk conference microphones (each member presses to speak) keep one clear voice on the track so Zoom can capture every word.
meeting_room.hub_linked_meeting: Linked to meeting #{{id}} — capture and pipeline links include this sitting.
meeting_room.hub_card_logitech_desc: Animated setup: USB, Windows input, Zoom/Teams device, expansion mics.
meeting_room.hub_card_pipeline_desc: How Zoom ASR and Claude fit together for Bislama sittings.
meeting_room.hub_card_capture_desc: Upload Zoom export or exception browser capture for a sitting.
meeting_room.hub_card_meetings_desc: Schedule sittings and open minutes editor.
meeting_room.hub_test_note_body: Schedule a sitting → meeting room → upload recording → paste garbled transcript → copy Claude prompt → generate minutes → build passes.
meeting_room.logitech_subtitle: Required for official Commission boardroom recordings
meeting_room.logitech_policy: Do not use laptop, tablet, or phone built-in microphones for official sittings. Use an approved room system: push-to-talk conference microphones (preferred for full Commission debates) or Logitech GROUP, routed as the sole Zoom/Teams input on the room PC.
meeting_room.logitech_step_usb_body: Plug the Logitech GROUP base unit into the room PC with the supplied USB cable. Wait for Windows to recognise the device.
meeting_room.logitech_step_usb_tip_1: Use a direct USB port on the PC, not an unpowered hub.
meeting_room.logitech_step_usb_tip_2: GROUP status LED should show ready.
meeting_room.logitech_step_forbid_body: Laptop, tablet, and phone microphones must not be used for the official recording.
meeting_room.logitech_step_forbid_tip_1: Close lid microphones on laptops if possible.
meeting_room.logitech_step_forbid_tip_2: Do not join the sitting from a personal phone for the master recording.
meeting_room.logitech_step_windows_body: Set Logitech GROUP as the default recording device in Windows Sound settings.
meeting_room.logitech_step_windows_tip_1: Settings → System → Sound → Input → Logitech GROUP
meeting_room.logitech_step_windows_tip_2: Speak a test phrase and confirm the input meter moves on GROUP only.
meeting_room.logitech_step_zoom_body: In Zoom or Microsoft Teams, select Logitech GROUP (or Echo Cancelling Speakerphone) for microphone and speaker.
meeting_room.logitech_step_zoom_tip_1: Zoom: Settings → Audio → Microphone → Logitech GROUP
meeting_room.logitech_step_zoom_tip_2: Teams: Settings → Devices → Microphone → Logitech GROUP
meeting_room.logitech_step_expansion_body: Connect optional expansion mics for larger boardroom tables so distant commissioners are captured clearly.
meeting_room.logitech_step_expansion_tip_1: Daisy-chain expansion mics per Logitech documentation.
meeting_room.logitech_step_expansion_tip_2: Place mics between chair and far commissioners.
meeting_room.logitech_step_record_body: Start cloud recording in Zoom/Teams, or local recording on the room PC. After the sitting, export and upload the file in this app.
meeting_room.logitech_step_record_tip_1: Confirm recording indicator is active before opening business.
meeting_room.logitech_step_record_tip_2: Upload the export via Meeting room → Upload recording.
meeting_room.pipeline_subtitle: Zoom ASR → Claude text repair → chair-approved minutes
meeting_room.pipeline_why_title: Why Zoom and Claude must work together
meeting_room.pipeline_why_claude: Claude is a text-based model. It cannot listen to your MP3 or M4A boardroom recording and type what it hears — it needs text input.
meeting_room.pipeline_why_zoom: Zoom (or Teams) can listen to the audio, but its automatic transcription does not support Bislama. The raw text it outputs is often garbled phonetic English.
meeting_room.pipeline_sequential_intro: To bridge this gap, use both tools in sequence:
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_zoom: Zoom transcriber — listens to audio, outputs garbled phonetic text
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_copy: Copy the garbled text from Zoom
meeting_room.pipeline_flow_claude: Paste into Claude — decodes Bislama patterns and writes clean English minutes
meeting_room.pipeline_copy_no_meeting: Link a meeting with ?meetingId= to copy a filled prompt.
meeting_room.pipeline_zoom_desc: Automatic speech-to-text. Blind to Bislama; outputs garbled English-like text.
meeting_room.pipeline_claude_desc: Repairs ASR text into formal English minutes. Does not listen to audio in this workflow.
meeting_room.pipeline_record_desc: Uploaded recording plus chair-approved minutes stored in this application.
meeting_room.pipeline_example_spoken: Yumi mas leftemap ol Principal i go long Manager fastem.
meeting_room.pipeline_example_zoom: You me mass left em up all principal he go long manager fast time.
meeting_room.pipeline_example_final: The Commission resolved to prioritize upgrading the Principal Officers to the Manager tier during the first phase of the restructure.
meeting_room.pipeline_warning: ASR may have mangled Bislama. Secretariat must review repaired text before the Chair signs minutes.
meeting_room.pipeline_step_1: Upload room recording (Logitech GROUP via Zoom/Teams).
meeting_room.pipeline_step_2: Paste Zoom transcript or run AI transcribe.
meeting_room.pipeline_step_3: Copy Claude prompt, repair text, paste into minutes editor.
meeting_room.pipeline_step_4: Generate draft minutes, review, Chair sign.
meeting_room.capture_subtitle: Upload Zoom/Teams export from room PC (recommended) or browser exception only
meeting_room.capture_policy_body: Use push-to-talk conference mics (full sittings) or Logitech GROUP — never laptop/phone mics. The room PC must send one clean feed to Zoom/Teams; upload the export here after the sitting.
meeting_room.pipeline_overlap_problem: In high-stakes debate (e.g. a blocked VBS restructure), commissioners often talk over one another. Three voices into one open table mic produce an unreadable blur that neither Zoom nor Claude can untangle.
meeting_room.pipeline_delegate_solution: Individual conference microphones with a press-to-speak button give a visual and physical cue to wait your turn. Only one mic is live at a time, so interruptions and cross-table shouting drop sharply.
meeting_room.pipeline_delegate_result: The recording carries one clear speaker at a time, so Zoom can capture words without overlapping gaps. Bislama will still need the Claude text-repair step — but the audio is no longer destroyed at source.
meeting_room.capture_upload_recommended: Recommended: upload recording from room PC
meeting_room.capture_upload_hint: Export from Zoom Cloud Recording, Teams, or save the local recording file after the sitting.
meeting_room.capture_drag_drop: Drag and drop audio or video file
meeting_room.capture_file_selected: File selected — review below or discard to choose another.
meeting_room.capture_device_blocked: Built-in or phone microphones are not permitted. Select the room conference or Logitech GROUP device.
meeting_room.capture_select_device: Select a Logitech GROUP microphone before recording.
meeting_room.capture_mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Allow microphone in browser settings.
meeting_room.capture_recorder_error: Recording failed due to a MediaRecorder error.
meeting_room.capture_file_size_error: File is too large. Maximum size is 500 MB.
meeting_room.capture_browser_gate: In-browser recording is for remote or exceptional circumstances only. Official boardroom sittings must upload the Zoom/Teams export with Logitech GROUP as mic.
meeting_room.capture_browser_confirm: I confirm this is a remote / exception recording
meeting_room.capture_uploading: Uploading… do not close this window
meeting_room.capture_upload_next: Next: paste Zoom transcript or open the minutes editor.
meeting_room.capture_recovery_empty: No audio data found for this session.
meeting_room.minutes_workflow_desc: Upload → paste Zoom transcript or AI transcribe → Claude repair → draft minutes.
meeting_room.minutes_step_paste: Paste Zoom transcript below (or view after AI transcribe)
meeting_room.minutes_step_claude: Copy Claude prompt and repair text externally
meeting_room.minutes_step_ai: Run AI transcribe / generate minutes / extract decisions
meeting_room.minutes_bislama_warning: ASR may have mangled Bislama — review transcript carefully before approving minutes.
